infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SnapNest needs camera access so you can record videos directly inside the app.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SnapNest needs microphone access to record audio with your videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SnapNest needs photo access so you can upload existing videos and images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SnapNest saves recorded videos to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SnapNest to access your camera to record videos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow SnapNest to access your photos to upload them.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow SnapNest to save videos to your library.
